name: Innistrad
collationMethod: sequential, C1/C2 commons (modified for fewer commons)

draft.notes: Only 9 commons; pack also includes 1 double-faced card and either a basic land or a checklist (checklist 3/4, land 1/4). A foil DFC displaces the normal DFC; other foils displace a common. [Refined: added dedicated DFC slot (filter: double_faced) so the pack totals 15.]

statedRates: basic land appears in 1/4 of packs, checklist in 3/4
sourceNotes: Large set with 20 double-faced cards; only 9 commons per pack to make room for the DFC slot. Three basic-land variations. Foil 1:67. 36 packs per box.
